sentences.target: Je couds un bouton sur ta chemise.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ku œ̃ butɔ̃ syʁ ta ʃəmiz/

translations.fr: Je couds un bouton sur ta chemise.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ku œ̃ butɔ̃ syʁ ta ʃəmiz/
translations.en: I'm sewing a button on your shirt.
translations.es: Estoy cosiendo un botón a tu camisa.
translations.de: Ich nähe einen Knopf an dein Hemd.
translations.it: Sto cucendo un bottone sulla tua camicia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在给你的衬衫缝一个纽扣。
translations.yue: 我喺你件恤衫上縫粒鈕。
translations.ru: Я пришиваю пуговицу к твоей рубашке.
translations.pt: Estou costurando um botão na sua camisa.
translations.vi: Tôi đang khâu một cái cúc vào áo sơ mi của bạn.
translations.nl: Ik naai een knoop aan je overhemd.
translations.uk: Я пришиваю ґудзик до твоєї сорочки.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारी कमीज़ पर बटन टाँक रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ράβω ένα κουμπί στο πουκάμισό σου.
translations.nb: Jeg syr en knapp på skjorten din.
translations.id: Saya sedang menjahit kancing pada kemejamu.
translations.sv: Jag syr fast en knapp på din skjorta.
translations.ro: Cos un nasture la cămașa ta.
translations.da: Jeg syr en knap på din skjorte.
translations.ja: あなたのシャツにボタンを縫い付けています.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular (je couds), expressing the action of sewing.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun, masculine singular, direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase expressing location/attachment.
2nd person singular possessive determiner, feminine singular, agreeing with 'chemise'.
Common noun, feminine singular, object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Il coud une poche sur son sac.
sentences.reading: /il ku yn pɔʃ syʁ sɔ̃ sak/

translations.fr: Il coud une poche sur son sac.
translations.ipa: /il ku yn pɔʃ syʁ sɔ̃ sak/
translations.en: He's sewing a pocket onto his bag.
translations.es: Está cosiendo un bolsillo a su bolsa.
translations.de: Er näht eine Tasche an seine Tasche.
translations.it: Sta cucendo una tasca sulla sua borsa.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在给他的包缝一个口袋。
translations.yue: 佢喺自己個袋上縫個口袋。
translations.ru: Он пришивает карман к своей сумке.
translations.pt: Ele está costurando um bolso na sua bolsa.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang may một cái túi nhỏ lên chiếc túi của mình.
translations.nl: Hij naait een zak op zijn tas.
translations.uk: Він пришиває кишеню до своєї сумки.
translations.hi: वह अपने बैग पर एक जेब टाँक रहा है.
translations.el: Ράβει μια τσέπη στην τσάντα του.
translations.nb: Han syr en lomme på vesken sin.
translations.id: Dia sedang menjahit saku pada tasnya.
translations.sv: Han syr en ficka på sin väska.
translations.ro: El coase un buzunar pe geanta lui.
translations.da: Han syr en lomme på sin taske.
translations.ja: 彼は自分のバッグにポケットを縫い付けています.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, subject.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun, feminine singular, direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase of location/attachment.
3rd person singular possessive determiner, masculine singular, agreeing with 'sac' (gender of possessor not specified).
Common noun, masculine singular, object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Nous cousons des ourlets ce soir.

translations.fr: Nous cousons des ourlets ce soir.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 우리는 단을 꿰매고 있어.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vamos fazer barras.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi sẽ may gấu quần.
translations.hi: आज रात हम किनारों की सिलाई कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: I kveld syr vi opp falder.
translations.sv: I kväll syr vi upp fållar.
translations.ja: 今夜は裾上げをします.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, subject.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural.
Plural indefinite article (historically 'de + les'), introducing the noun 'ourlets'.
Common noun, masculine plural, direct object of the verb.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'soir' to form a temporal NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; here functions as a temporal complement (time expression).

sentences.target: Je voudrais coudre une jupe simple.

translations.fr: Je voudrais coudre une jupe simple.
translations.en: I'd like to sew a simple skirt.
translations.es: Me gustaría coser una falda sencilla.
translations.de: Ich möchte einen einfachen Rock nähen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想缝一条简单的裙子。
translations.pt: Eu gostaria de costurar uma saia simples.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn may một chiếc váy đơn giản.
translations.nl: Ik wil een eenvoudige rok naaien.
translations.hi: मैं एक सरल स्कर्ट सिलना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θα ήθελα να ράψω μια απλή φούστα.
translations.nb: Jeg vil gjerne sy et enkelt skjørt.
translations.id: Saya ingin menjahit sebuah rok sederhana.
translations.sv: Jag vill sy en enkel kjol.
translations.ro: Aș vrea să cos o fustă simplă.
translations.da: Jeg vil gerne sy en enkel nederdel.
translations.ja: シンプルなスカートを縫いたいです.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, subject.
Main verb in conditional present, 1st person singular; expresses a wish and selects an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'voudrais'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the noun 'jupe'.
Common noun, feminine singular, direct object of 'coudre'.
Adjective in post-nominal position, agreeing in gender and number with 'jupe' (feminine singular).
